commands.review_summary:
The PR adds plugin-facing external-content provenance to before_tool_call events and contexts, detects wrapped untrusted content from prompt/tool-result context, shares same-run provenance by runId, and updates related tests, docs, and type exports.

PR surface: Source +260, Tests +346, Docs +39. Total +645 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows production web_fetch output is wrapped by wrapExternalContent with id-based markers, while the PR detector only recognizes marker lines containing BEGIN.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because this public plugin/security hook contract needs a production-marker repair, maintainer API-semantics approval, and contributor-supplied real behavior proof.
